description: Starting point where Jacob receives God's promise. Jacob flees from his brother Esau.
Jacob's famous vision of the ladder to heaven with angels ascending and descending
Waypoint on the journey toward Mesopotamia
Major city on the route northward through Syria
Jacob arrives at his uncle Laban's house and works for 20 years for Rachel and Leah
Jacob returns to Canaan, heading south from Haran. Laban catches up with him here.
Jacob wrestles with God and is renamed Israel. Reconciliation with Esau.
Jacob settles at Shechem in Canaan, building an altar to God
